creator: beech@FreeBSD.org
text:
> >Description:
>
> In Makefile mkdir ${PREFIX}/share/applications before copy some
> files to it
>
> --- Makefile.diff begins here ---
> --- Makefile.orig	2007-07-29 07:41:51.000000000 +0800
> +++ Makefile	2007-07-29 07:41:31.000000000 +0800
> @@ -41,6 +41,7 @@
>  	@${INSTALL} -d ${DATADIR}/
  	@${INSTALL} -d ${PREFIX}/share/applications/  <----- same as 
${MKDIR}

>  	@${CP} -R ${WRKSRC}/ ${DATADIR}/
 +	@${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/share/applications <----- Not needed, see 
above.

>  	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKDIR}/emesene.desktop
> ${PREFIX}/share/applications/ @${INSTALL_SCRIPT}
> ${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}.sh ${PREFIX}/bin/${PORTNAME}
>

This patch is not necessary. 

Beech

--
